sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 8

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 8:1
items.html: (to the question) That Bi'a Kadma'a [first coming] includes two Zivugim [couplings]: the first, Mochin of VAK [the six ends], which raise her AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] to her and complete her discernment of Kelim [vessels]; from this Zivug she receives from ZA [Zeir Anpin] the discernment of the Kli that raises MAN [Mayin Nukvin]. And afterwards, in the second Zivug, she receives the discernments of the Lights of Gadlut; from this Zivug she attains from ZA the Rucha Kadma'a [first spirit]. (p. 808, Items 104 and 105)
